back_translation: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'Command the sons of Israel and say to them: When you come to the land of Canaan, this is the land which shall fall to you as an inheritance, the land of Canaan by its borders.'
'And the south corner shall be for you, from the Wilderness of Zin along the side of Edom; and your southern border shall be from the end of the Salt Sea eastward.'
'And the border shall turn for you from the south to the Ascent of Akrabbim, and pass over to Zin; and its endings shall be south of Kadesh-barnea; and go out to Hazar-addar, and pass over to Azmon.'
'And the border shall turn from Azmon to the Brook of Egypt, and its endings shall be at the Sea.'
'And the western border — the Great Sea and the border shall be for you; this shall be for you the western border.'
'And this shall be for you the northern border: from the Great Sea you shall mark out for yourselves Mount Hor.'
'From Mount Hor you shall mark out for the entrance of Hamath, and the endings of the border shall be to Zedad.'
'And the border shall go out to Ziphron, and its endings shall be at Hazar-enan; this shall be for you the northern border.'
'And you shall mark out for yourselves for the eastern border, from Hazar-enan to Shepham.'
'And the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, east of Ain; and the border shall go down and strike against the slope of the Sea of Chinnereth on the east.'
'And the border shall go down to the Jordan, and its endings shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land by its borders all around.'
And Moses commanded the sons of Israel, saying: 'This is the land which you shall inherit by lot, which the LORD commanded to give to the nine tribes and the half tribe.'

'For the tribe of the sons of the Reubenite, by their fathers' house, and the tribe of the sons of the Gadite, by their fathers' house, and the half tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance.'
'The two tribes and the half tribe have received their inheritance from across the Jordan of Jericho, eastward toward the sunrise.'
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'These are the names of the men who shall apportion to you the land: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua son of Nun.'
'And one leader, one leader from each tribe, you shall take to apportion the land.'
'And these are the names of the men: for the tribe of Judah, Caleb son of Jephunneh.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Simeon, Shemuel son of Ammihud.'
'For the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad son of Chislon.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Dan, a leader, Bukki son of Jogli.'
'For the sons of Joseph, for the tribe of the sons of Manasseh, a leader, Hanniel son of Ephod.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Ephraim, a leader, Kemuel son of Shiphtan.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Zebulun, a leader, Eli-zaphan son of Parnach.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Issachar, a leader, Paltiel son of Azzan.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Asher, a leader, Ahihud son of Shelomi.'
'And for the tribe of the sons of Naphtali, a leader, Pedahel son of Ammihud.'
These are the ones whom the LORD commanded to apportion the inheritance to the sons of Israel in the land of Canaan.
